_comment: App Store Connect + Google Play metadata for Spinr Rider. Fill in the values marked TODO before submitting. See docs/deploy/04-mobile-eas.md for submission steps.

app_store_connect.name: Spinr – Rider
app_store_connect.subtitle: Rides. Simple. 0% Commission.
app_store_connect.apple_id: TODO: numeric App Store Connect app ID (e.g. 1234567890)

en-CA.description:
Spinr is the Saskatchewan-first rideshare platform built on a simple principle: drivers keep what they earn.

0% commission on every ride. No surge pricing games. Fares set by the community.

• Book a ride in seconds — just enter your destination and go
• Real-time driver tracking on a live map
• OTP-verified driver identity for every trip
• Split the fare with friends in one tap
• Scheduled rides up to 7 days in advance
• Wallet top-ups and promotional credits
• Emergency SOS with one button
• Full trip history with receipts and downloadable tax documents
• Dark mode and accessible design for everyone
en-CA.release_notes:
v2026.04 — initial public release.
• Fare split, scheduled rides, wallet, and loyalty points
• Accessibility improvements throughout
• Dark mode
en-CA.promotional_text: Saskatchewan's first 0% commission rideshare. Launch offer: $5 off your first ride.

app_store_connect.review_notes:
This is a rideshare marketplace. Drivers and riders both authenticate via SMS OTP. The app uses location services continuously while a ride is in progress so the driver map and ETA update in real time. There is no web login; everything goes through the mobile app.

Test account (rider):
  Phone: +1 306 555 0101
  OTP: 1234 (test environment)

Backend smoke-test URL: https://spinr-api.fly.dev/healthz

The payment flow uses Stripe test mode in the review build. No real charges are made.

screenshots._comment: Place PNG files in rider-app/store-assets/screenshots/. Naming convention: <platform>-<size>-<screen>.png
